case_title: SAM'S GOLD IMPORTS INC. VS MCREYNOLDS, DICK MR. & MRS. DBA MCREYNOLDS JEWELRY

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAM'S GOLD IMPORTS INC.
